synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0988 Oracle Linux 9 podman bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0988
description:
[5.6.0-12.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[6:5.6.0-12]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/360c775)
- fixes "[podman-5.6] Crash in podman-system-migrate due to nil c.runtime.storageService [rhel-9.7.z]"
- Resolves: RHEL-141491
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0988

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0988.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
podman-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-docker-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
podman-plugins-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
podman-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-docker-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
podman-plugins-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/podman-5.6.0-12.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[5.6.0-12.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[6:5.6.0-12]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/360c775)
- fixes "[podman-5.6] Crash in podman-system-migrate due to nil c.runtime.storageService [rhel-9.7.z]"
- Resolves: RHEL-141491
